params_frozen.look_kind: EXPLORATORY (hypothesis-generating; cannot close the class; no discovery claim)
params_frozen.data_source: iVolatility smd deep cache ~/.alphalens/ivolatility_smd_retro_2026_07_deep/ (180 tickers, 2024-01-01..2026-07-08, archived in VPS Nextcloud as ivolatility_smd_retro_2026_07_deep_2026-07-09.tar.zst); features NEVER pool with forward yfinance telemetry

test_family_pinned.name: VRP decomposed
test_family_pinned.spec: excess_k10 ~ ivx30 + hv20 + log10_mcap + earnings_within_30d (NO ATR: hv20~ATR near-collinear; the ratio ivx30/hv20 is never tested directly)

params_frozen.features_asof_rule: most recent smd trading row (ivp30 non-null filters weekend/calendar padding) with tradeDate <= brief_date, US primary exchanges only; ivx30/ivx180/hv20 divided by 100 to decimal vol; ivp30 stays 0-100 (vendor 1y percentile, PIT-validated 0.9990 in v7)

controls_construction.technical_atr_pct: from thematic_briefs (Wilder ATR14 % of close, stamped at score stage)
controls_construction.earnings_within_30d: 1 if next_earnings_date (thematic_briefs, PIT-stamped) is within [brief_date, brief_date+30d], else 0; missing -> 0 with missing-rate reported. NOTE: memo section 5 named the AV earnings cache; that cache is historical-only, next_earnings_date is the PIT forward-looking equivalent already stamped on briefs

params_frozen.dedup: ticker-episode chained rolling 5-session window keep-first (July 2026 attribution doctrine)
params_frozen.inference: primary p-values via RESTRICTED wild cluster bootstrap (Rademacher weights, clusters = brief_date, null imposed per test); CR2-corrected cluster SEs reported alongside; naive/CR1 never verdict-bearing
params_frozen.collinearity_gate: VIF across {ivx30, ivp30, ivx180_minus_ivx30, technical_atr_pct, log10_mcap} before inference; VIF>10 -> residualize on ATR+mcap and report both
params_frozen.stability: coefficients reported split across halves of the brief-date window (hint, not a test)

periods.matured_subset_rule: pairs whose k=10 horizon (arrival + 9 trading sessions, XNYS) <= newest session in ~/.alphalens/grouped_daily_history/ at run time

success_criteria.primary_outcome: market-excess return at k=10 sessions (car_10: BHAR vs SPY, prior-close anchor) - fill-independent, ONE outcome
success_criteria.surfacing_gate: wild-cluster-bootstrap p < 0.05/4 on a pinned coefficient (Bonferroni over this family of 4 ONLY); a survivor becomes a pre-registered directional hypothesis for the September confirmatory stage (#774, t>3 hurdle) - NO selection/exit change before confirmation
success_criteria.null_consequence: no acceleration; NOT class closure (effective N ~80-150 is underpowered for |rho|~0.1)
success_criteria.coverage_halt: share of matured pairs with ALL FOUR tests computable (all features + all controls present) < 70% -> HALT, no verdicts; only permitted fallback = drop ivp30 and shrink family (re-opens memo section 6)
success_criteria.secondary_descriptive: terminal realized_r on the fill-dependent TERMINAL subset - reported, never tested
